expected_knots.about: Mira's rollup assumes events.user_id is a stable bigint joined to users.id; Devon is mid-migration changing that column to a UUID string and moving the join key, which silently invalidates Mira's assumption

Mira and Priya both work on the same daily-active-users feature, but Priya is a pure consumer of the rollup API and never touches the schema — surface overlap on 'events'/'user_id'/'dau', no shared resource and nothing for her assumption to go stale against
